---
title: "google analytics"
---

# Google Analytics Experience

This page highlights my experience using Google Analytics 4 to understand website performance, user behavior, and digital marketing effectiveness.

## What I Analyzed

Throughout the semester, I used GA4 to review different types of website data, including:

- Website traffic
- User engagement
- Traffic sources
- Device usage
- Events and conversions
- Add-to-cart and purchase behavior

## Key Skills Demonstrated

- Understanding digital analytics
- Identifying important KPIs
- Reading GA4 reports
- Comparing time periods
- Interpreting audience behavior
- Connecting data insights to marketing decisions

## Marketing Value

Google Analytics helps marketers understand how users interact with digital content. By analyzing GA4 reports, I was able to better understand where users come from, what actions they take, and how businesses can improve their digital marketing strategies.
